body:
Parent issue: #126

Stage: assign-agent-handle

## Task

Implement best-effort assignment of accepted Sepo tasks to the configured agent handle. Derive the assignee login from AGENT_HANDLE by default, e.g. @sepo-agent -> sepo-agent. Before assigning, check whether that login is assignable for the issue/PR; if not assignable or assignment fails, continue without failing the run and surface a clear log/setup warning. Apply assignment when Sepo accepts issue/PR work through existing routes, without using assignment as the source of truth. Keep labels/mentions as the automation signal layer, preserve the activity-label behavior from PR #134, and update focused tests plus docs for the new behavior. Avoid introducing a separate AGENT_ASSIGNEE unless the implementation proves AGENT_HANDLE cannot cover the default case.

## Base

- base_pr: #134

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:126 stage:assign-agent-handle state:running parent_round:3 -->
